summary: Final Game state - Completed Early Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: FR,FS,FG,FV,FF,FC,FD,FB,FP,FL,FE,FA,FO,FI,OM,OR,OS,OG,OV,OF,OC,OD,OB,OP,OL,OE,OA,OO,OI
steps.result: THEN 'FINAL' is displayed in white text left justified below the match-up header
